title: Pritt Glue Stick, Safe & Child-Friendly Craft Glue for Arts & Crafts Activities, Strong-Hold Adhesive for School & Office Supplies, 25x11 g Pritt Stick on Amazon
description: From the manufacturer Pritt Glue Stick Safe & Child-Friendly Craft Glue for Arts & Craft Activities Let your children grow through creativity by getting hands-on with arts & crafts and learning with the high-quality, non-toxic kids glue stick. With a 97% natural ingredients formula*, the glue is not only one of the safest glue formulas available, but it can also be washed out in low temperatures after messy play times! With a strong and long-lasting hold, the glue is easy to apply and results in fewer lumps or wrinkles on paper thanks to the low-water formula. With a range of sizes, the glue stick is ideal for children to create everything they can imagine from gluing paper into their school notebooks to big craft projects. The craft glue for kids need not only be for children to bring their ideas to life – this is also the ideal addition to your office supplies for use by those of any age! The Original - Since 1969 Simple application Apply the adhesive smoothly and evenly to the surface (paper/cardboard etc.). If necessary, reposition the surfaces before the adhesive dries. *Incl. Water ** Less water content, higher efficiency, tested with 160 g / m2 paper, analyzed by the Fraunhofer IFAM Institute. The Product Benefits at a Glance: Child-friendly & safe Easy to apply Strong initial tack on various crafting materials Low paper wrinkling Non-toxic and washable Ideal as a kid’s craft glue & for the office Dries clear Long-lasting performance Thanks to the low water content, the glue stick is highly efficient and long-lasting – ideal for use during arts and crafts or as a school glue. The low water content means less paper wrinkling, with no loss of adhesive strength. Pritt Stick is suitable for paper, cardboard, felt, photos, cotton and more. Inspire creativity Help children develop their creativity through arts and crafts with our safe craft glue for kids. Suitable for a variety of materials, Pritt Sticks are a beloved childhood memory for people all over the world - unleash your child's creativity, or rediscover your own! No paper wrinkles Due to the low-water formula, the glue results in no paper wrinkles – not only ideal for a kids glue but also practical for office supplies. One stick of Pritt glue will last for months, allowing you to glue thousands of pieces of paper - or whatever other craft or office material. The natural adhesive power of Pritt In 1969, Henkel invented the first glue stick based on the mechanism of a lipstick and introduced the Pritt brand. Since then, Pritt has been a leader in the adhesives field thanks to its strong values, innovations and technologies: As a unique brand that produces glue from potato starch, Pritt is a pioneer in the field and an important part of everyday life for every consumer. The products promote children's motor and cognitive skills through creative handicrafts. In addition, Pritt is socially committed: for fair conditions in areas where access to schooling is poor and in the education of children with severe learning deficits.
